event_categories.name: Music & Festivals
event_categories.description: Live music concerts, multi-day festivals, and cultural music events.

event_categories.name: Theatre & Performing Arts
event_categories.description: Plays, musicals, dance performances, and live performing arts.

event_categories.name: Film & Cinema
event_categories.description: Independent films, classics, special screenings, and film festivals.

event_categories.name: Workshops & Classes
event_categories.description: Hands-on workshops, classes, and educational cultural activities.

promo_codes.description: 20% off festival and event tickets on orders of $120 or more.
10% off early bird tickets for select events.
$5 off family-friendly workshops and kids events.

venues.name: Aurora City Amphitheater
venues.description: Open-air amphitheater along the riverfront, ideal for summer music festivals and outdoor film nights.

venues.name: Downtown Arts Theatre
venues.description: Historic 800-seat indoor theatre hosting plays, dance, and live performances.

venues.name: Riverside Cinema Complex
venues.description: Modern multi-screen cinema with premium sound and late-night festival screenings.

venues.name: Harborfront Festival Grounds
venues.description: Large mixed-use festival grounds with both tented indoor halls and outdoor stages.

venues.name: Community Creative Hub
venues.description: Indoor community center with studios and classrooms for workshops, family events, and small performances.

venues.name: Lakeside Cultural Pavilion
venues.description: Scenic lakeside pavilion featuring a covered main hall and open-air lawn for concerts and cultural fairs.

festival_passes.name: Aurora Summer Music Fest 3-Day Pass
festival_passes.description: Full weekend access to Aurora Summer Music Fest including all main stage headliners, late-night DJ sets, and afternoon acoustic sessions.

festival_passes.name: Harborfront Festival Weekend Explorer Pass
festival_passes.description: Three-day explorer pass for Harborfront Festival Grounds with access to all outdoor stages, covered tents, and late-night club showcases.

festival_passes.name: Lakeside Culture Carnival 4-Day Pass
festival_passes.description: Four days of music, theatre, film, and workshops at the Lakeside Cultural Pavilion with reserved access to select seated performances.

festival_passes.name: City Culture Combo 3-Day Pass
festival_passes.description: Discover the city’s best with a combined pass covering select music stages, theatre performances, and late-night film screenings over three days.

festival_passes.name: Aurora Weekend Duo Pass
festival_passes.description: Two-day pass ideal for a quick weekend getaway, granting access to all Saturday and Sunday daytime performances.

festival_passes.name: Family Daytime Discovery 3-Day Pass
festival_passes.description: Family & kids–friendly daytime access for three days of workshops, performances, and open-air activities. Evening concerts not included.

festival_passes.name: Harborfront VIP 5-Day Platinum Pass
festival_passes.description: All-access five-day VIP upgrade with backstage lounges, priority entry, and exclusive viewing decks at Harborfront Festival Grounds.

festival_passes.name: Festival Cinema Week Pass
festival_passes.description: Seven-day access to all festival film screenings, Q&A sessions, and late-night retrospectives at Riverside Cinema Complex.

festival_passes.name: Indie Nights 3-Evening Pass
festival_passes.description: Three-evening pass focused on indie bands and experimental performances across smaller stages and club venues.

festival_passes.name: Spring Opening 2-Day Launch Pass
festival_passes.description: Celebrate the start of festival season with a two-day pass for the spring opening weekend.

festival_passes.name: Creator Labs 4-Day Workshop Pass
festival_passes.description: Four-day pass for intensive hands-on workshops, lectures, and maker labs at Community Creative Hub and partner venues.

events.title: Aurora Summer Music Fest 2026
events.subtitle: Three days of indie, pop, and electronic on the riverfront
events.description: Aurora’s flagship summer music festival featuring international headliners, emerging local acts, and late-night DJ sets across multiple outdoor stages at the Aurora City Amphitheater.

events.title: Lakeside Jazz & Blues Weekend 2026
events.subtitle: Smooth evenings by the water with top jazz and blues artists
events.description: A relaxed three-day lakeside festival with classic jazz big bands, modern fusion acts, and late-night blues jams at the Lakeside Cultural Pavilion.

events.title: Harborfront Summer Festival 2026
events.subtitle: City-wide beats across the harborfront stages
events.description: A high-energy three-day festival at Harborfront Festival Grounds with chart-topping acts, underground DJs, and waterfront food markets.

events.title: Lakeside Culture Carnival 2026
events.subtitle: Four days of music, theatre, film, and workshops
events.description: A cross-genre cultural carnival at the Lakeside Cultural Pavilion featuring concerts, outdoor theatre, curated film screenings, and creative workshops for all ages.

events.title: City Culture Weekend 2026
events.subtitle: Music, theatre, and film across the city in one pass
events.description: A three-day city-wide program centered at Lakeside Cultural Pavilion with satellite events at local theatres and cinemas, combining live music, stage productions, and late screenings.

events.title: Family Daytime Discovery Festival 2026
events.subtitle: Kid-friendly performances and hands-on activities
events.description: A three-day, family-focused daytime festival with storytelling, gentle concerts, creative workshops, and interactive installations designed for kids and caregivers.

events.title: Creator Labs Intensive Workshop Series 2026
events.subtitle: Four days of maker labs, talks, and hands-on classes
events.description: A four-day program at Community Creative Hub with back-to-back workshops in digital art, sound design, and physical making, ideal for creators looking to level up their skills.

events.title: Saturday Sunset Park Concert
events.subtitle: Live bands and picnic vibes at the pavilion
events.description: A relaxed early-evening outdoor concert featuring local bands and acoustic performers, perfect for a budget-friendly Saturday outing.

events.title: Downtown Improv Comedy Night
events.subtitle: Fast-paced improv and audience participation
events.description: An energetic improv troupe takes over Downtown Arts Theatre for a night of unscripted comedy, sketches, and audience-inspired scenes.

events.title: Street Art Walking Tour & Workshop
events.subtitle: Explore murals and design your own stencil
events.description: A guided walking tour of Aurora’s mural district followed by a hands-on stencil and spray technique workshop at Community Creative Hub.

events.title: Family Clay & Craft Workshop
events.subtitle: Hands-on clay fun for kids and grown-ups
events.description: A family-friendly Saturday session with simple clay projects and crafts designed for adults and children to work on together.

events.title: Classic Film: Casablanca (Restored Print)
events.subtitle: One-night-only 4K restoration screening
events.description: Experience the timeless classic on the big screen in a newly restored 4K print with enhanced sound at Riverside Cinema Complex.

events.title: Weeknight Jazz Session at the Theatre
events.subtitle: Intimate quartet performance on the main stage
events.description: A cozy midweek concert featuring a contemporary jazz quartet performing standards and originals at Downtown Arts Theatre.

events.title: Indie Film Spotlight: City Lights Reframed
events.subtitle: Award-winning indie drama with director Q&A
events.description: A special indie screening followed by a live Q&A with the director and lead actor, part of the Indie Film Spotlight series.

events.title: Blockbuster Preview Night
events.subtitle: Early access screening of a major new release
events.description: Catch the latest blockbuster before general release with this special Friday preview screening at Riverside Cinema Complex.

events.title: Midnight Echoes
events.subtitle: A psychological drama by Aurora City Players
events.description: A gripping new stage thriller following a family confronting long-buried secrets during a single sleepless night, staged with immersive lighting and sound.

events.title: Spring Strings Chamber Concert
events.subtitle: An evening of classical quartets by the lake
events.description: A refined chamber music program featuring a string quartet performing works by Mozart, Debussy, and contemporary composers in the Pavilion Hall.

events.title: Creative Coding for Kids Weekend Workshop
events.subtitle: Playful introduction to code, art, and music
events.description: A two-day workshop where kids and parents learn basic coding concepts through drawing, simple games, and music using kid-friendly tools.

ticket_types.name: General Admission 1-Day
ticket_types.description: Standard 1-day wristband with access to all general admission areas.

ticket_types.name: VIP 1-Day
ticket_types.description: Includes access to VIP viewing decks and VIP bar areas.

ticket_types.name: General Admission Weekend
ticket_types.description: Standing and lawn access to all stages for a single festival day.

ticket_types.name: VIP Reserved Seat
ticket_types.description: Reserved covered seating with table service near the main stage.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Open lawn access; bring your own blankets and chairs.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Unassigned seating in the main theatre.

ticket_types.name: Workshop Ticket
ticket_types.description: Includes guided tour, workshop materials, and refreshments.

ticket_types.name: Adult
ticket_types.description: Adult participant ticket; includes all materials.

ticket_types.name: Child
ticket_types.description: Child ticket for ages 5–12; must be accompanied by an adult.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Standard cinema seating for the screening.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Unreserved seating in the main auditorium.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Standard ticket including access to the post-screening Q&A.

ticket_types.name: Student
ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for students with valid ID.

ticket_types.name: Senior
ticket_types.description: Reduced-price ticket for guests aged 65 and over.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Preview night ticket for the new release.

ticket_types.name: Student
ticket_types.description: Student ticket for the preview screening.

ticket_types.name: Senior
ticket_types.description: Senior ticket for the preview screening.

ticket_types.name: Standard
ticket_types.description: Standard seats in the central orchestra section.

ticket_types.name: Premium
ticket_types.description: Best-availability seats in the front-center rows.

ticket_types.name: Balcony
ticket_types.description: Upper balcony seats with a full-stage view.
